all_text_sections.text: Fun times in the mountains! We enjoyed our stay in this gorgeous cabin. We played games, we laughed, we ate! Our group consisted of four generations: 1 great-grandmother, 2 daughters, 3 grand-daughters, 4 great grandchildren. Thanks for the memories! ~ Alabama

Our family came up for fall break from school and it was the perfect getaway for us and our 2 girls. The views from the porch are amazing and we enjoyed the pool table and games. Others must check out Fall Branch Falls, Amicalola Falls, Appalachian Trail Rides, and Shaka Alpaca Farm! The trail ride

Experience one of the best Blue Ridge luxury cabin rentals in the heart of the Aska Adventure Area! Taking its name from a Five for Fighting song of the same name, you can “almost touch the stars hanging over you” at Above the Timberline.

This four-bedroom lodge-style cabin offers the perfect blend of cozy ambience and spacious living, making it ideal for a North Georgia romantic getaway or family vacation. With King bedrooms on each of the three floors, Above the Timberline ensures that everyone experience the pinnacle of comfort. S

Because of its supreme location in the Aska Adventure Area, you are close to hiking trails in the mountains and kayak and tube rentals on the Toccoa River, which runs parallel to Aska Road. In this locale, you are in close proximity to waterfall hikes, rainbow trout fishing, and gem mining for the k

After a day filled with adventure, the cabin’s well-stocked kitchen and open floor plan invite you to create and share meals with breathtaking panoramic mountain views as your backdrop. Whether dining indoors, al fresco, or enjoying wine by the outdoor wood-burning fireplace, each moment here is a m
Head downstairs to the terrace level for a memorable experience in this luxury game room. Above the Timberline holds so many options for a fun-filled evening!

Rates for cabin rentals are based on per night for up to four guests. Add $25 per person, per night above four guests. A cleaning fee will be added, based on the number of guests. All cabin rentals prices and minimum stays are subject to change at anytime even if not posted on site.Please contact us
Proudly serving Blue Ridge for almost 20 years!

travelex.surrounding_text: In today’s changing travel environment, it's important to protect your travel investment so you can relax and enjoy your trip. Unforeseen events such as flight delays, baggage loss or even a sudden sickness or injury could impact your travel plans. For your convenience, we offer Travelex Insurance Services Travel Basic, Travel Select, and Travel Med protection plans to help protect you and your travel investment against the unexpected.For more information on the available plans click here or contact Travelex Insurance 800-228-9792 and reference location number 10-0454.

all_text_sections.text: Girls Weekend for Dawn's Fabulous 50th Birthday!! We enjoyed the great views, hot tub, hiking, shopping, eating, and laughs. Friends from different times of life came together to celebrate a wonderful friend. Thank you for everything! Enjoy the memories you will make here!

We had the absolute best cabin vacation in Blue Ridge this year! We loved the hikes and hot tub! The view is so beautiful and cool. We sat and ate out on the deck and had a fire in the firepit. We hiked to so many beautiful places. Saw lots of waterfalls and enjoyed our rainy movie day. The pool tab
Thanks for a wonderful cabin! We enjoyed the views and cabin very much. We explored the nearby sights during our stay like Fall Branch Falls, the Lily Pad Village, and the Swinging Bridge! Thanks!
